VS Battles Wiki

Shadow Energy

User blog
Sign In to Save

Description

Shadow Energy is a particle with a conscience that exists inside every living being in the Shadow Fight universe and fills all possible dimensions. It is a power that depending on its users' Shadow potential can be used in many different ways, for the better or worse of the world. Through the series, this energy is represented by the colors black, cyan blue, turquoise, and only in the second game, it appears purple and pink in color. Shadow Energy can be found in different forms, those being: liquid form, gaseous form, solid matter, individual sub-atomic particles spread through the universe, and it can even be an abstract substance when it is located inside someone's mind. It originates from the Shadow World planet and found its way on Earth when the Gates of Shadows were opened by Shadow. Over the years people on Earth started to use this dangerous power in their daily lives for the better good, while others completely reject it and wish it to be destroyed. This conflict will later cause a war between different nations over the fate of the Shadow Energy, and its core, The Sphere.

Shadow Form Physiology

Shadow Form is a feature that fighters can access by having enough inner Shadow Energy gained through fighting. Some characters have perks and other special abilities that allow them to gain this inner Shadow Energy very fast, while others are permanently in Shadow Form at all times. It should be noted that using anger can allow even common, unskilled users to gain permanent Shadow Form, although this very likely causes a lot of harm to the user, leading to death (1).

  • Shadow Energy Manipulation: While in Shadow Form one can manipulate the Shadow Energy around them, although skilled users do not have to necessarily be in Shadow Form to manipulate Shadow Energy, only to use special Shadow Abilites.
  • Elemental Intangibility: Shadow Form allows for intangibility due to the many forms Shadow Energy can take, for example liquid, fire, air, light etc..
  • Inorganic Physiology: The user's biological body turns into an inorganic, Shadow Energy one.
  • Immortality (Types 1 and 5): While in Shadow Form one can't die (1).
  • Self-Sustenance (Types 1, 2, 3): While in Shadow Form one loses their human body, and thus they don't trouble themselves with the typical requirements of life.
  • Statistics Amplification: While in Shadow Form one's movements become faster and they gain more stamina (1).
  • Non-Physical Interaction: While in Shadow Form one can interact with the "shadow world" and Non-Corporeal beings who inhabit the mind such as Shadow Mind (1, 2), but can also interact with the Dream World and beings who inhabit it such as Shadow Mind.
  • Enhanced Vision: While in Shadow Form one's vision becomes enhanced, granting:
    • Neutral Vision: The ability to see signs that are only visible in Shadow Form (1), and also the Dome that is invisible to the common man (1, 2, 3).
    • Multiple Vision with Night Vision: This is a special ability that was given to Shadow by the Gates of Shadows in Shadow Fight 2, the ability to view the most foul side of the world, its darkest side (1) with all of its shadow inhabitants. Though it should be noted that even common Shadow Form users in Shadow Fight 3 possess this type of vision.
  • Non-Corporeal: Characters like Shadow (Shadow Fight 2), Shadow Mind and Shadow Beasts lack any true bodies and souls and exists purely as minds.
  • Invulnerability: Star Chasers can temporarily become immune to death by entering Shadow Form when their health is out.
  • Possibly Power Modification: While in Shadow Form, Blast Zones turn into Shadow Energy (1, 2).
  • Resistance to Physics Manipulation: By using Shadow Abilities (special moves available only in Shadow Form), fighters can defy the laws of physics (1).
  • Resistance to Void Manipulation: Even the thinnest layers of Shadow Energy can separate a void from the outside, material world, whithout getting erased by it (1). Also, as stated by Titan, Shadow Form allows one to go though the Gates of Shadows, a feat he states is a walk between the worlds (1) without dying. Later on in Shadow Fight 3, Ling calls a space-time rift that leads to the Void Room a rift "between the worlds", which is similar to the Gates of Shadows (1, 2).
  • Summoning: This is a power strictly related to Shadow's Shadow Form in Shadow Fight 2. It is a special power that the Gates of Shadows gave him. It allows him to block out the sun by looking at it, summoning the Eclipse.
    • Dimensional Travel: Shadow can enter the "Eclipse realm" after summoning the Eclipse, allowing him to fight with the Shadow Demons that possess his enemies (1).
    • Time Travel: The Eclipse can send Shadow back in time to face his beaten foe once again (1).

Uses

  • Unholy Manipulation: Shadow Energy is considered by the Legion as being an evil source of power that is a threat to all of humanity, because it is related to the Shadow Beasts that killed a lot of people in past. Its unholy traits are confirmed as being true, due to the Legion's holy equipments being able to remove the Shadow Energy that is lurking inside of one's body.
    • Summoning: Shadow Energy users can summon Shadow Beasts for combat purposes. Some Shadow Beasts can drive people insane just by being looked at or simply fright their opponents (1). Some of the most skilled Shadow Energy users can summon The Scourge, which is a more powerful version of the Shadow Beasts that is individually controled by Shadow Mind, which can possess others by infecting them with Shadow Energy.
    • Corruption (Type 2): Excessive doping of Shadow Energy turns pure souls and twists clear minds by inducing sin and vice into the heart, essentially revealing the darkest and most immoral corners of one's thoughts and personality through their actions. The same beings are then shortly after converted into mindless Shadow Beasts. Usually those who are corrupted by Shadow Energy also experience a deadly illness (1).
    • Elemental Manipulation: Shadow Energy can take the form of fire (1), water, earth and light (1), and due to its esoteric nature it can directly affect the mind and soul of the target, ignoring conventional durability in the process.
  • Existence Erasure: The strongest Shadow Energy emissions are able to erase one's body, soul and mind if they are hit by them (1, 2).
    • Willpower Manipulation: The same emissions can erase the target's will (1).
  • Power Modification: Shadow Orbs can be used to make the current properties of an equipment vanish, and be replaced by new ones, although this is not combat applicable (1).
  • Power Mimicry: Shadow Orbs can be used to mimic Mythical Enchantments on basic gear, although this is not combat applicable.
  • Invisibility: Heralds know an advanced Shadow Energy technique that allows them to turn invisible (1). One of Ling's apprentice turned themselves invisible by using Shadow Energy (1). Bolo also used Shadow Energy to make the Dome invisible to the common man (1, 2, 3).
  • Portal Creation: Ling could create small portals using a lot of Shadow Energy (1, 2, 3, 4, 5)
  • Regeneration & Forcefield Creation: Itu can heal himself by using Shadow Energy, while also creating a shield to protect himself from projectiles (1).
  • Possibly Transmutation: Shadow Energy can turn body parts that come in contact with them into Shadow Energy (1, 2, 3).
  • Poison Manipulation: Shadow Energy can cause contamination (1).
  • Life Manipulation/Regeneration: Shadow Energy can become Life Fountains, replenishing the health of those who stand on them (1, 2).
  • Space-Time Manipulation (as Portal Creation and Dimensional Travel): Shadow Energy can be used to create space-time rifts that can be used as portals (1, 2, 3). Bolo created a time-loop pocket dimension using Shadow Energy aswell (while there are not any direct statements of him creating this world, he can alter the internal structure of said dimension like manipulating its time and the way to break out of this dimension and escape it, as if he created it). Moira created a kind of a Dome of parallel reality by casting an invisible, Shadow Energy barrier between the Dynasty Palace and the outer world, in which she was causing a time loop (1, 2, 3).
  • Time Manipulation: Shadow Mind can turn back time in a place that has no time and space (The Accelerator Core erased the world from existence, along with its time and space (1)). Shadow Energy can be used to control time (1). Bolo's first experiment with time was the imprisonment of Marcus in the time loop (1, 2).
  • BFR with Sealing: Bolo can use Shadow Energy to send his foe in his time-loop dimension. While in this dimension, time loops constantly, resetting the memories of every trapped person. The only way to get out of this cycle is to kill/defeat the "key" person (whom Bolo choses) to of this dimension. (1). Bolo also banished his clones in a space-time rift (1, 2).
  • Disease Manipulation: Some guards were going to quarantine the victims of the rig explosion who were sick from Shadow Energy (1). The Emperor was quarantined due to the shadow disease he had from the Sphere (1). The Descendant once fought a man with a terminal shadow disease (1). Moira at some point was infected with a shadow disease called the Scourge (1).
  • Biological Manipulation & Genius Intelligence: The Heralds boosted their brains with Shadow Energy to unprecedented levels, thus becoming incredibly smart (1, 2, 3).
  • Matter Manipulation: Shadow Energy can change the structure of any material (1).
  • Mind Manipulation: The Shadow Rig explosion caused everyone affected by it to act weird (1). Raw Shadow Energy destroys the mind (1). June (possessed by Shadow Mind) can use Shadow Energy to mind control people (1).
  • Plant Manipulation: Shadow Energy can be used to manipulate plants (1).
  • Teleportation: Common Shadow Energy users can teleport themselves short distances, while Shadow Mind can teleport itself anywhere there is Shadow Energy (1, 2).
  • Sleep Manipulation: Chief put the Sleeping Knigh in a deep-sleeping state using Shadow Energy (1, 2).
  • Halucination Causation: Coming in contact with raw Shadow Energy causes hallucinations (1).
  • Explosion Manipulation: Splitting a single shadow particle causes a blast of energy, creating even more Shadow Energy (1, 2).
  • Cosmic Awareness: The Rectangle of Dimensions gives Bolo the ability to recollect memories from all timelines, which allows him to remember any change made in the past (1).
  • Limited Time Travel: Bolo can use Shadow Energy (The Rectangle of Dimensions in this case) to teleport himself or others back to the present after they traveled in the past.
  • Illusion Creation: Bolo cloaked the Void Room using Shadow Energy so that nobody could ever find it again, except for him (1, 2).
  • Soul Manipulation & Unholy Manipulation: Shadow Energy can affect the soul, turning a former holy Abdicator knight into an evil, unholy one (1).
  • Platform Creation: Jet can create Shadow Energy platforms for offensive purposes.
  • Necromancy: Using the remains of a dead person, one can put them in motion with Shadow Energy, bringing them back to life as a mindless undead (1, 2).
  • Soul Manipulation: Shadow Energy can be used to rip the soul out of an opponent's body (1).
  • Weapon Creation: Shadow Energy can be used to conjure weapons, with some that can be utilized as projectiles.
  • Telekinesis: Shadow Energy is used by some fighters to control their weapons after throwing them.
    • Choking: Some users can choke their opponents by forming a tight ring of Shadow Energy around their necks.
  • Danmaku: Shadow Mind can shoot many projectiles of Shadow Energy at once to overwhelm its opponents.
  • Body Control: Shadow Energy can be used to raise Shadow Energy spikes out of a user's Shadow Form "body" for offensive purposes.
  • Chain Manipulation: Shadow Energy can be conjured into chains that are used to limit the target's movement.
  • Earth Manipulation: Shadow Energy can be used to create earth walls for offensive purposes.
  • Electricity Manipulation: Some fighters can infuse their weapons with Shadow Energy, making it so that when they hit their target a large thunderbolt appears to hit the enemy.
  • Self-Healing: Shadow Energy brew can be drank to regain health.
  • Breath Attack: Ling can drink treated Shadow Energy and spew it out of his mouth as fire, damaging his opponent.
  • Paralysis Inducement: Shadow Energy can be used to stun targets.


Shadow Anomalies

Shadow Anomalies are large/massive accumulations of Shadow Energy that are considered to be some of the most chaotic manifestations of Shadow Energy. They are extremely dangerous as they interact negatively with their surroundings, causing reality-warping disasters, storms and many more. They can only be supressed by the most skilled Shadow Energy users, Anomaly Hunters or Shadowdivers. The most skilled Shadow Energy users can create powerful Shadow Anomalies with just a small bit of Shadow Energy.

  • Gravity Manipulation: Anomalies can cause massive parts of earth near them the size of islands to start floating in the air (1, 2).
  • Darkness Manipulation with Weather Manipulation: Anomalies can cause darkness and thunderstorms to form around them (1).
  • Space-Time Manipulation (as Portal Creation and Dimensional Travel): Anomalies can become space-time rifts that can be used as portals.
  • Life Manipulation: Anomalies can drain the life energy of living things around them (1, 2, 3), and can even do it on water (1).
  • Illusion Creation: Anomalies can cause illusions around them (1, 2, 3). Even after seeing the Dome with her own eyes, June still thought that it was a mirage (1).
  • Time Manipulation: An expansion of the Dome with all of its anomalies would cause a time diffusion in it, causing everyone inside to be caught in a time loop in which whenever someone dies their time gets turned back so they can relive their life cycle after cycle (1, 2, 3, 4, 5).
  • Duplication: Anomalies can create evil doppelgangers of those who come near them (1).
  • Dimensional Travel: Some anomalies can become portals that lead to other dimensions, such as Bolo's time loop dimension (1, 2).
  • Madness Manipulation (Type 3): Anomalies can brutalize those who get exposed to them, turning them into raging, mindless people (1).
  • Corruption (Type 2) & Mind Destruction: Extremely powerful anomalies can turn people into agressive husks, becoming over time as empty as robots, knowing only to take orders (1, 2).
  • Radiation Manipulation: Anomalies can emit very high levels of deadly shadow radiance (1).
  • Time Travel & Portal Creation: Some anomalies can become portals thorugh time (1, 2).
  • Reality Warping: Some space-time rifts emanate "time energy" that warps and distorts anything it touches (1, 2, 3).
  • Chaos Manipulation & Time Manipulation: The Void Room space-time rift creates a shadow nightmare and temporal distortion around it (1, 2, 3 (the building in the background is under the effect of time distortion, constantly having its time turned back anytime Descendant starts a new fight in that location)).
    • Duplication: The Void Room space-time rift replicates anybody that it remembers (those who have been near it), be it dead persons or even alive ones (1, 2).
    • Summoning: The Void Room space-time rift can summon the Shadow Beast that possessed Emperor and can summon one of Bolo's clones (1).
  • Law Manipulation: The Gates of Shadows were a Shadow Anomaly so powerful that when Shadow was fighting against challengers and the six Shadow Demons near them (the maximum known radius is around 50 kilometers) he was forced to fight under the side-effect Fight Rules imposed by them, such as:
    • Increased vulnerability within shown area: Fighters are exposed to taking more damage than usual from outside sources when they stand in a glowing area.
    • Inverted movement: The Shadow Anomaly makes any of the enemy's movements inverted, as in a mirror, by walking to the left they will move to the right, and vice versa.
    • Random Equipment: The Shadow Anomaly randomizes what equipment the enemy will use in a fight.
    • No ranged weapon and no magic: The Shadow Anomaly forbids the enemy from using their magics or ranged attacks.
    • No kicks: The Shadow Anomaly forbids the enemy from using their kicks.
    • Kicks only: The Shadow Anomaly forces the enemy to fight only using kicks.
    • Passing burning effect: The Shadow Anomaly makes it so that fighters near it will pass between each other an effect that slowly drains their health.
    • The player loses on ring-out: The Shadow Anomaly makes it so that the enemy lose their will to fight if they step out of the arena's red ring.
    • Hot ground: The Shadow Anomaly makes the enemy lose their will to fight if they stay on the ground for five seconds or more.
    • The player loses health in shown area: The Shadow Anomaly makes it so that the enemy will slowly have their heath drained when they stand in a glowing area.
    • Shrinked fight location: The Shadow Anomaly forces the enemy to fight in a location which has its borders closer to each other than ususal.

Shadow Energy Inventions

  • The Void Room: A void that is contained within thin layered walls of Shadow Energy that is also a Nigh-Omniscient amalgamation of the minds of the smartest Heralds to have ever lived which even proves to have human emotions. It exists beyond time, space and dreams and from its perspective the past and future of the entire Shadow Fight verse happen at the same time. Whoever steps inside the Void Room can ask it any question to receive an answer. The Void Room's response message is projected through a simulation of a being the one who asks met in the past or will meet in the future, and that simulation has to be defeated in combat first in order to speak. If the Void Room has neutral feelings for the one who asks it a question, then its answer, while its essence is completely true and accurate, is delivered as a riddle, leaving to many interpretations one can make out of it. If the Void Room sees the person who wants to ask it a question as an important one, it will answer them clearly and immediately before the person even gets to ask it the question in the first place. It should be noted that the Void Room's messages are not only answers to questions, but they can also be warnings that death is soon to come in the near future to the one who asks if they are not careful enough, or that a decision the one who asks made in the past will strongly pay a big part in future events, or it can also teleport the one who asks it to any place they wish to go to.

Weaknesses

  • The Legion's holy equipment is able to burn the Shadow Energy out of one's body, rendering those who rely heavily on Shadow Energy in combat to be mostly powerless without it.
  • Constant use of Shadow Energy can sometimes be lethal on non-experienced users.
